markets.question: Will the price of Solana be above $120 on March 14?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for SOL/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

Price precision is determined by the number of decimal places in the source.

markets.question: Liaoning Tieren FC vs. Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC: O/U 3.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game between Liaoning Tieren FC and Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC, scheduled for March 21 at 3:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Liaoning Tieren FC and Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Liaoning Tieren FC vs. Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game between Liaoning Tieren FC and Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC, scheduled for March 21 at 3:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Liaoning Tieren FC and Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. markets.question: Spread: Qingdao Hainiu FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game, scheduled for March 20 at 7:35 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Qingdao Hainiu FC" if Qingdao Hainiu FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Zhejiang Zhiye FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game, scheduled for March 20 at 7:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Dalian Yingbo FC" if Dalian Yingbo FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Shanghai Haigang FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Dalian Yingbo FC vs. Shanghai Haigang FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Chinese Super League game, scheduled for March 20 at 7:00 AM ET.

markets.question: Spread: Shanghai Haigang FC (-1.5)
